_comment: Source build manifest for clang-llvm-source-build. Pins SHA256 for all vendored source archives and built binaries. LLVM parts are individually hashed plus the reassembled tarball is verified against the official upstream hash. Ninja has no official upstream checksum — hash is self-computed from the vendored tarball at time of pinning.

sha256._note: ninja-build does not publish official SHA256 checksums for release assets. This hash was self-computed from the vendored tarball at time of pinning (2026-03-17). Verify independently by re-downloading from the upstream release and comparing.

sources.name: Self-computed from vendored tarball (no official upstream checksum published)

clang_tidy_linux._note: Binary built from LLVM source on Rocky Linux 8 / RHEL 8 x86_64. Strip applied post-build. Reassemble with: cat bin/linux/clang-tidy.part-* > bin/linux/clang-tidy && chmod +x bin/linux/clang-tidy

clang_tidy_windows._note: Built from LLVM source on Windows 11 x86_64 via build-clang-tidy.sh. Not vendored as a committed binary — each developer builds from the vendored LLVM source. Run: sha256sum bin/windows/clang-tidy.exe and update this field after building.
